improvements.title: AI Lyrics Generator
improvements.description: Add a 'Generate Lyrics' button in the Lyrics tab. Sends the track name, prompt, genre, themes, and mood to Claude and returns a full set of lyrics (verse/chorus/bridge structure). Show the result in a preview modal with 'Apply' and 'Regenerate' buttons.

improvements.title: Dark/Light Mode Toggle
improvements.description: Add a sun/moon toggle button in the header to switch between dark and light mode. Use next-themes (already installed). Persist the preference in localStorage. Ensure all components look polished in both modes.

improvements.title: Audio Download Button
improvements.description: Add a Download button in the WaveformPlayer and in the versions list for each version that has an audioUrl. Triggers a browser download of the audio file with filename '{track-name}-v{N}.mp3'. Use fetch + createObjectURL for cross-origin Vercel Blob URLs.

improvements.title: Global Full-text Search
improvements.description: Add a global search command palette (Cmd+K / Ctrl+K) that searches across all tracks, version prompts, and lyrics in real time. Show results grouped by track with snippet previews. Clicking a result navigates to that track and selects the version. Use a Dialog/modal with an input at the top and scrollable results below.

improvements.title: Track Duplication
improvements.description: Add a 'Duplicate Track' option in a track context menu (three-dot menu in the sidebar). Creates a full copy of the track with all versions, prompts, styles, and scores, appending ' (copy)' to the name. Navigate to the duplicated track after creation.

improvements.title: Prompt Evolution Timeline
improvements.description: Add a 'History' view in the Prompt tab that shows how the prompt evolved across all versions in a vertical timeline. Each step shows version number, the prompt text, rating stars, and a small diff highlight against the previous version. Makes it easy to see the creative progression.

improvements.title: Onboarding Empty State
improvements.description: When the dashboard has no tracks, show a rich empty state instead of a blank page: a welcome message, a list of 3 key features with icons, and a prominent 'Create your first track' button. Also add a dismissible onboarding tip banner for first-time users explaining the workflow (Create track → Set style → Generate → Evaluate).

improvements.title: Version Archiving
improvements.description: Add an 'Archive' action on versions. Archived versions are hidden from the main list but accessible via a 'Show archived' toggle. Add archive/unarchive to the version context menu. Update the versions-tab to filter archived versions by default. This keeps the workspace clean without losing history.

improvements.title: AI Co-Producer Chat
improvements.description: Add a collapsible chat panel (right side drawer) where the user converses with Claude as a 'co-producer'. The chat has full context of the selected track (prompt, style, lyrics, scores, feedback) and can propose changes via structured tool-like responses with one-click 'Apply to prompt/lyrics/style' buttons. Persist chat history per track in a new chat_messages table.

improvements.title: A/B Listening Blind Test
improvements.description: Add a 'Blind Test' mode: pick 2+ versions with audio, the app shuffles them as 'Option A/B/C' hiding version numbers, user listens and picks a winner per pair. After voting, reveal which version won and offer to mark it as best. Great for unbiased evaluation.

improvements.title: Public Share Pages
improvements.description: Add a 'Share' button that generates a public read-only page (/share/[token]) for a track version: artwork placeholder, waveform player, lyrics, and style summary. Token stored in a new share_links table with revoke support. This is the #1 feature for the project to gain notoriety — users share their creations.

improvements.title: Auto-Evaluation with AI
improvements.description: Add an 'AI Evaluate' button in the Evaluate tab: sends the prompt, lyrics, and style to Claude which returns suggested dimension scores (with one-line justification per dimension) and overall feedback. User can accept all scores with one click or adjust. Stores justifications in notes.

improvements.title: Batch Generation (Variations)
improvements.description: Add a 'Generate 3 Variations' button: creates 3 new versions cloned from the current one with AI-mutated prompts (Claude generates 3 distinct creative variations of the prompt), then starts generation for each sequentially. Progress cards stack in the versions tab.

improvements.title: Activity Feed / Changelog
improvements.description: Add an 'Activity' panel showing a chronological feed of everything that happened in the workspace: track created, version generated, marked best, theme assigned, etc. Derive events from existing timestamps (no new table needed initially). Filterable by track.

improvements.title: PWA + Mobile Responsive Layout
improvements.description: Make the dashboard fully responsive: collapsible sidebar drawer on mobile, stacked tabs, touch-friendly sliders. Add PWA manifest + icons so users can install the app on their phone home screen. Massive reach win for notoriety.

improvements.title: Style Presets Save/Load
improvements.description: Let users save the current Style tab configuration as a named preset (stored in a style_presets DB table) and load it into any version. Presets dropdown at the top of the Style tab with save/delete management.

improvements.title: Landing Page
improvements.description: Create a public marketing landing page at / (move dashboard redirect to a 'Launch App' button): hero with animated gradient, feature grid showcasing AI generation/versioning/evaluation, screenshots section, and CTA. This is the front door for the project's notoriety.

improvements.title: Generation Cost & Usage Dashboard
improvements.description: Track every generation request (provider, model, duration, success) in a generation_logs table. Add a 'Usage' page showing total generations, success rate by provider, most productive days (bar chart), and estimated API costs. Pure SVG charts, no new deps.
